title: Integration Testing with CI/CD Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on automated integration testing in CI/CD pipelines.

questions.question: Regarding the integration of integration tests into your CI/CD pipeline, what is the primary role of Continuous Delivery (CD)?
options: To automatically deploy your built and tested code changes into a production-like environment

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a integration-testing-CI-based workflow?
options: Automatically running your code's tests—such as those for your API and database—as soon as changes are pushed into a branch
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
